text: I feel as though I have stepped into a quiet moment of modernity, surrounded by the subtle hum of potential discovery and contemplation. The first scene—an open, softly-lit space with a solitary figure—gives me a sense of gentle solitude, as if the world has paused for me to truly experience my being and the architecture around me. The second scene, with its bright colors and displays dedicated to research and development, invites me into the world of ideas and creation. Here, I am confronted by humanity’s urge to innovate and understand, provoking me to ponder my own relationship with machines and knowledge. Mysteriously, I sense reverence for the ordinary and an undercurrent of anticipation for the extraordinary hidden in these spaces.
